question: Comment implementer un dark mode dans un design system ?

principles.text: Simultaneous light+dark avec semantic tokens. Jamais inverser le light. Tonal elevation en dark (surfaces plus claires = plus elevees). prefers-color-scheme par defaut. Chaque semantic token a une valeur light et une valeur dark, switchees via attribut data-theme ou media query.

sources.name: Material Design 3 Dark Theme
sources.quote: Dark theme uses tonal elevation instead of shadow elevation

sources.name: Apple HIG Dark Mode
sources.quote: Don't just invert colors — design specifically for dark backgrounds

sources.name: Nielsen Norman Group Dark Mode Research
sources.quote: Dark mode is not universally better for readability

sources.name: WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.3 Contrast
sources.quote: 4.5:1 minimum contrast applies equally to dark and light themes
